title: Malaysia’s Anti-Graft Agency to Quiz Ex-Minister Over Arm Deal
content: Rafizi Ramli, Malaysia's economy minister, gestures as speaks during a Bloomberg TV interview on the sidelines of the Malaysia Economic Forum 2025 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on Thursday, Jan. 9, 2025. Restoring fiscal health is key for Malaysia to retain emerging Southeast Asia’s highest credit score as Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s government restores political stability and drives the nation’s economic resurgence.

text: Malaysia’s Anti-Graft Agency to Quiz Ex-Minister Over Arm Deal. Rafizi Ramli, Malaysia's economy minister, gestures as speaks during a Bloomberg TV interview on the sidelines of the Malaysia Economic Forum 2025 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on Thursday, Jan. 9, 2025. Restoring fiscal health is key for Malaysia to retain emerging Southeast Asia’s highest credit score as Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s government restores political stability and drives the nation’s economic resurgence.
summary_tr: Malezya'nın Anti-Suç Agency'sı eski Ekonomi Bakanı Rafizi Ramli'yi bir silah anlaşması üzerine soruşturacak.
reasoning: Investigation into former minister over arm deal indicates potential corruption and negative signal for the government.
